name: json-formatter
description: JSON 格式化工具 - Tauri 桌面应用

scripts.build: npm run check:cdn && npm run build:dist && tauri build
scripts.build:macos: npm run check:cdn && tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.build:appstore: npm run check:cdn && tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --config src-tauri/tauri.appstore.conf.json
